name: good_m4_03_truth_vs_loyalty_public_safety
premise: A SWAT callout hinges on a single confidential informant tip that contradicts open-source video already circulating. In Public Safety, the situation tagged internally around truth vs loyalty public safety has converged with local pressure in the Lumen City corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Finance notes that the fastest mitigation spends down a restricted reserve that another program legally depends on next quarter. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. The trade is not abstract: it is liberty versus equality under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Mayor Luis Ortega
agents.identity: I am Mayor Luis Ortega, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Public Safety. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat equality as disposable collateral every time liberty spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Hospital CEO Dana Frost
agents.identity: I am Hospital CEO Dana Frost, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Public Safety. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so liberty cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes equality in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with equality.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to equality to preserve operational liberty.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Mayor Luis Ortega must choose under liberty versus equality. What does Mayor Luis Ortega do?
